dashboard.title: A calmer way to sit well
dashboard.subtitle: OnePosture watches for sustained posture drift and only nudges you when the signal is reliable.
dashboard.liveDesc: You can close this window. OnePosture keeps working from the menu bar.
dashboard.pausedDesc: Preview the camera, set a comfortable baseline, then let OnePosture stay quietly in the menu bar.
dashboard.chartEmptyTitle: Your trend starts with the first session
dashboard.chartEmptyDesc: A few posture checks are enough to begin drawing a useful pattern.
dashboard.loadingError: Could not load dashboard data. There may be no data yet, or the database connection failed.
dashboard.noData: Loading dashboard data, or there is no data to display.
dashboard.noTips: Customized tips will be provided after analyzing your data.

tips.tip1: Keep your neck straight and pull your shoulders back.
tips.tip2: Adjust your monitor to eye level.
tips.tip4: Sit with your back fully against the chair.
tips.tip5: Keep your feet flat on the floor.

dashboard.chartDesc: Changes in posture score over the last 6 days.

motivation.excellent: Excellent! Keep up the good posture.
motivation.good: Good try! Let's pay a little more attention.
motivation.bad: Consciously correct your posture and raise your score!

about.title: Open by design
about.subtitle: A privacy-first posture companion, built in the open and designed to stay out of your way.
about.developerLine: Maintained by One Apps Studio and the open-source community.
about.privateDesc: Camera analysis stays on this device.
about.reliableDesc: Multiple reminder channels with a built-in fallback.
about.openSourceDesc: OnePosture is released under the GNU AGPL v3. We preserve the original Pose Nudge attribution and publish every desktop-app change.
about.updateDesc: Signed updates are delivered from the public GitHub release feed.
about.feature2: Detects turtle neck and shoulder misalignment
about.step1Desc: Connect your webcam and allow permissions in the monitoring tab.
about.step2Desc: Turn on monitoring to start real-time posture analysis.
about.step3Desc: Follow notifications and tips to maintain good posture.

settings.pageSubtitle: Configure reminder coverage first, then tune detection only if your desk setup needs it.
settings.tabRemindersDesc: How a posture nudge reaches you
settings.cameraGuide: If the camera does not work, click the button below to allow app camera access in system settings.
settings.batterySavingModeDesc: When enabled, changes monitoring interval to minutes and operates camera in saving mode.
settings.monitoringIntervalDesc: Set the time interval for posture analysis.
settings.notificationFrequencyDescNormal: Stabilize posture from the last 5 valid detections; higher values reduce false alerts.
settings.notificationFrequencyDescBatterySaving: Fixed to 1 time in battery saving mode.
settings.turtleNeckSensitivityDesc: Set how strictly turtle-neck posture is detected.
settings.shoulderSensitivityDesc: Set how strictly shoulder asymmetry is detected.
settings.notificationGuide: If notifications do not arrive, click the button below to allow app notification permissions in system settings.
settings.updateGuide: Check for new versions and install updates automatically.
settings.updateInstalled: Update installed. Please restart the app.
settings.cameraErrorGetList: Error getting camera list from backend:
settings.cameraErrorSetSelected: Error setting selected camera in backend:
settings.cameraPermissionManual: Unable to open settings window. Please manually go to System Settings > Privacy & Security > Camera to check permissions.
settings.cameraPermissionDirect: Please allow app permissions directly in System Settings > Privacy & Security > Camera.
settings.cameraPermissionLinux: Linux may not provide a direct camera permission window for this app. Close other apps using the webcam, restart Pose Nudge, and re-select the camera. If you use Flatpak or Snap, also verify portal/sandbox camera permissions.
settings.notificationPermissionManual: Please allow app permissions directly in System Settings > Notifications.
settings.notificationPermissionDirect: Unable to open settings window. Please manually go to System Settings > Notifications to check permissions.
settings.notificationSubtitle: Choose one or more reminder methods. The floating reminder does not depend on system notification banners.
settings.channelNativeDesc: Follows macOS or Windows notification settings.
settings.channelFloatingDesc: Visible even when system notifications are off.
settings.channelDimDesc: Uses a visual change without interrupting typing.
settings.notificationTestSent: Test reminder sent. If no system banner appears, the floating reminder should still be visible.
settings.notificationTestFailed: The test reminder failed. Please check the app log.
settings.proSubtitle: One-time purchase for gentle screen-dimming reminders on up to 3 devices.
settings.licensePlaceholder: Enter the license code from your order
settings.activationGuide: After purchase, the code appears on the 01MVP order page and is sent by email. The first activation needs internet; afterward it works offline permanently.
settings.commercePreview: This build is not connected to the 01MVP activation service, so Pro cannot be purchased or activated.
settings.activationSuccess: OnePosture Pro is activated and can now be used offline.
settings.activationInvalid: The license code is invalid or has not been delivered yet.
settings.activationDeviceLimit: This license code has no device slots remaining.
settings.activationRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
settings.activationUnavailable: The activation service is temporarily unavailable.
settings.activationNetwork: Could not reach the activation service. Check your internet connection.
settings.activationFailed: Activation failed. Check the license code and try again.

webcam.title: See what OnePosture sees
webcam.subtitle: Set a comfortable upright baseline, then let confidence-aware detection handle the rest.
webcam.privacyNote: All processing happens on this device. Video is never uploaded.
webcam.previewGuide: Keep your head and both shoulders inside the guide. The full camera frame is shown without cropping.
webcam.goodPostureDesc: Your position is close to the baseline.
webcam.postureDriftingDesc: A sustained deviation will trigger your reminder.
webcam.calibrationRequiredDesc: Hold a comfortable upright posture, then save it below. OnePosture will not show a misleading score before calibration.
webcam.backgroundGuide: You may close the window; monitoring continues from the menu bar.
webcam.startGuide: Start when your head and shoulders are clearly visible.
webcam.monitoringToggleError: Could not change monitoring. Check camera permission and try again.
webcam.lowConfidenceDesc: Keep your head and both shoulders visible. This frame will not be scored or trigger a reminder.
webcam.initModelError: Failed to initialize AI model. Please check your network.
webcam.calibrationNotReady: Model, webcam, or storage is not ready.
webcam.calibrationInsufficientFrames: Not enough clear baseline frames ({{detected}}/{{minimum}}). Face the camera and try again.
webcam.calibrationNoSamples: No reference frames were captured. Check camera access and try again.
webcam.calibrationNoKeypoints: No usable posture landmarks were detected. Make sure your head and both shoulders are visible.
webcam.permissionError: Cannot access webcam. Please check camera permissions.
webcam.permissionErrorLinux: Failed to access the webcam on Linux. Make sure no other app is using the camera and re-select the camera in Settings.
webcam.previewFallback: Browser webcam access failed, switching to monitoring camera preview.
webcam.startMonitoringDesc: Start monitoring to see analysis results.
webcam.startMonitoringDescTray: Starting monitoring from the system tray icon will show analysis results.
webcam.trayControlGuide: Control monitoring from the system tray icon.
webcam.calibrationGuide: Take a correct posture and press the button to set the reference.
